title: Change device type to a Cover time-based

error.entity_down_required: The 'down' entity is required when using switch or light entities.
error.mixed_entity_types: Cannot mix cover entities with switch or light entities. Use either a cover entity for both up and down, or switch/light entities.
error.different_cover_entities: When using a cover entity, the same entity must be used for both up and down.
error.stop_not_supported_for_cover: A stop entity is not supported when wrapping a cover entity; the cover already handles stop internally.

user.title: Create a Cover time-based from other entities
user.description: Pick two switches or lights (or a single cover entity) to show in Home Assistant as a time-based cover. The original entities will be hidden.

data_description.name: Name of the new cover to create.
data_description.up: Entity that will open the cover. Use a cover entity here to wrap an existing cover with time-based position tracking.
data_description.down: Entity that will close the cover. Leave empty when using a cover entity for 'up' (the same cover is used automatically).
